productDisplayName: OTLS Unisex Green Dual Flap Bag
description: Green and brown, fabric and synthetic leather, dual flap sling bag with one main compartment Has an organizer sleeve inside and a flap with magnetic button closure Second compartment has a zippered insert pocket inside, flap with magnetic button closures Adjustable buckles with a tang clasp at the sides and on the front Single adjustable strap and a short handle
